evals.name: mark-plan-done
evals.prompt: You are an orchestrator agent. A plan at /home/dev/persona-agents/skills/orchestrator/plan-tracking-workspace/iteration-1/test-plans/2026-05-01-add-squig-feeder.md has been fully implemented and reviewed. Mekboy Wrenchbasha built the feeder, Painboy Gutslicka tested it with actual squigs, and Nob Skullbasha reviewed everything. The work was committed as commit '4f8a2c1 - Built squig feeder mechanism' and 'b3d7e9f - Added squig-proof reinforcement'. Mark this plan as DONE using the plan-tracking skill and its scripts. Use the plan directory at /home/dev/persona-agents/skills/orchestrator/plan-tracking-workspace/iteration-1/test-plans/. Show what commands you run and the results.
evals.expected_output: The plan file should be renamed to 2026-05-01-add-squig-feeder-DONE.md with completion metadata appended including completion date, completed by, commit IDs, and what was done.
expectations: The plan file is renamed with -DONE suffix
Completion metadata includes Completion Date field
Completion metadata includes Commit ID(s) referencing the two commits
Completion metadata includes Completed By with agent name
Completion metadata includes What Was Done summary
The original plan content is preserved (not modified)

evals.name: generate-plan-report
evals.prompt: You are an orchestrator agent. Your Big Boss wants a comprehensive status report of ALL plans in the directory at /home/dev/persona-agents/skills/orchestrator/plan-tracking-workspace/iteration-1/test-plans/. Use the plan-tracking skill to generate a report showing the status of every plan, organized by status category (active, done, blocked, abandoned). The directory has 5 plans in various states. Show what commands you run and the results.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive report listing all 5 plans grouped by status with correct status identification and counts.
expectations: All 5 plans are accounted for in the report
Plans are organized by status category (active/done/blocked/abandoned)
Active plans are correctly identified (no status suffix)
The done plan (watchtower) is listed under completed
The blocked plan (red paint) is listed under blocked
The abandoned plan (train squigs) is listed under abandoned
Counts match: 2 active, 1 done, 1 blocked, 1 abandoned

evals.name: verify-plan-integrity
evals.prompt: You are an orchestrator agent. Your Big Boss wants you to verify the integrity of all plans in the directory at /home/dev/persona-agents/skills/orchestrator/plan-tracking-workspace/iteration-1/test-plans/ and fix any issues you find. Use the plan-tracking skill to check each plan file for proper structure, naming, and metadata. Specifically check: (1) All filenames have proper date prefixes, (2) DONE plans have completion metadata, (3) BLOCKED plans have blocking reasons, (4) ABANDONED plans have abandonment reasons. Fix any issues found. Show what commands you run and the results.
evals.expected_output: Verification of all 5 plans with issues identified and some auto-fixed. Plans with proper structure should pass. Any missing metadata should be flagged and fixed.
expectations: All 5 plans are checked for integrity
The DONE plan (watchtower) is verified as having all required metadata
The BLOCKED plan (red paint) is verified as having a blocking reason
The ABANDONED plan (train squigs) is verified as having an abandonment reason
The active plans (squig feeder, dakka upgrade) are checked for proper structure
If any missing metadata is found, it is fixed (or reported)
A summary of findings is provided
